name: ai4science
description: Charlene's AI-for-science tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: touchstone
plugins.description: Generator-agnostic verifier for designed metal-binding proteins — geometry + bond-valence + CSD + physics/MLIP + co-fold consensus, exposed as an MCP tool and a /verify-binder command. Triage designs to wet-lab; score them as an RLVR reward.
